name: @galerinaa/framework-api-server
description: Galerina HTTP API-server adapter: a thin node:http transport that buffers the request body under a hard DoS cap and hands every request to the non-bypassable App Kernel. It never pre-empts a kernel gate except the additive body cap.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
